findings.title: Unmount useEffect does not unregister AbortController from inFlightRegistry
findings.suggested_fix: Add unregisterAIRequest(abortRef.current) before or after abort() in the unmount cleanup return function

findings.title: Duplicate import: CONSENT_PURPOSES imported twice from same module
findings.suggested_fix: Merge the two imports from @/lib/compliance/consentService into one statement

findings.title: frozenReason persists after re-granting ai_embeddings consent (updateLearnerModel spreads existing without clearing)
findings.suggested_fix: When writing a session update in updateLearnerModel, clear frozenReason (set to undefined) if the caller's update does not explicitly set it. Or implement a grantConsent post-effect that clears frozenReason on all learnerModels for the user.

findings.title: Race condition: re-loading consents after grant/withdraw in PrivacySection loses in-flight updates
findings.suggested_fix: Instead of re-fetching from Dexie after each operation, update local state optimistically and only re-fetch on error. Current code calls listForUser() after every operation which is a network-free Dexie read — low risk, but redundant and slightly brittle.

findings.title: db.embeddings.clear() deletes ALL embeddings including TranscriptEmbeddings — scope may be too broad
findings.suggested_fix: If the db.embeddings table only contains note embeddings, this is correct. Verify whether transcript embeddings (TranscriptEmbedding) live in a separate Dexie table or the same one. If same table, note embeddings and transcript embeddings should be deleted separately or the clear() remains correct (both are AI-generated from user content).

residualRisks: frozenReason not cleared on re-grant — learner model stays frozen until explicitly unset
inFlightRegistry stale entries on component unmount (non-functional but memory concern)
testingGaps: No unit test for EmbeddingPipeline.indexNotesBatch() guard behavior
No unit test for courseEmbeddingService consent guard
